page: Microsoft Azure E96nds_v6 is an Endv6-family virtual machine configured with 96 dedicated vCPUs based on the x86_64 Intel processor architecture. Running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this server provides 768.0 GB of system memory, establishing an 8.0 GB memory-to-vCPU ratio.

This server type features 5669 GB of local storage and is designated as Premium Storage capable. It is classified as network-optimized, making it suitable for environments requiring high-throughput network interfaces alongside substantial local storage capacity. No GPU accelerators are included in this configuration.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the E96nds_v6 offers a high density of memory and local storage relative to its 96 dedicated compute cores, reducing the need for external storage attachments in data-intensive setups. This resource profile is designed for memory-intensive workloads, large-scale databases, network-heavy applications, and enterprise-grade data processing tasks.
description: The Microsoft Azure E96nds_v6 is an Endv6-family virtual machine featuring 96 dedicated vCPUs built on an x86_64 Intel processor architecture and managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It delivers 768.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. For storage, the instance is equipped with 5669 GB of local disk capacity and supports Premium Storage. As a network-optimized server, it is engineered for high-throughput network demands without integrated GPU acceleration. This configuration offers high resource density, making it a qualitatively cost-effective choice for memory-heavy and storage-intensive deployments. The E96nds_v6 is suited for enterprise databases, large-scale data processing, and network-intensive workloads.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E96nds_v6 is an Endv6-family virtual machine featuring 96 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 768 GB of RAM, and 5669 GB of local storage, optimized for network-heavy and memory-intensive enterprise workloads.

tagline: A network-optimized virtual machine featuring ninety-six dedicated cores, substantial memory capacity, and extensive local storage for demanding enterprise workloads.

768.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core
